nasb.text: None of his sins that he has committed will be remembered against him. He has practiced justice and righteousness; he shall surely live.

esv.text: None of the sins that he has committed shall be remembered against him. He has done what is just and right; he shall surely live.

cnv.text: 他所犯的一切罪，必不被記念；他行了公平和正直的事，就必存活。

ccb.text: 他犯的罪不会被追究，因为他行事公正仁义，所以必得存活。
